优点：十分爽，整个过程没有虐，女友们十分和谐，是开的后宫，但不是种马文，系统存在感一般，但奖励十分爽。
缺点：有一点地方出的错，但不影响观看，有些情感戏太仓促，直接就上了。
总结：系统，爽文，整个过程没有虐，十分好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1623669886,"group_id":"6853750848665685005","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我站着读，坐着读，躺着读，趴着读读读读读就爱看小说，已疯勿扰","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzrxs7n2BSDqqFitBg3IjaAs4UWfOws/11PvWWGBNJq+","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2b32c0a60cdf46d18e6004a6a3cf39da~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791967&x-signature=Qh4WftzGJX%2FwBNxNKQ0kcYL%2BLRM%3D","user_id":"1169512740703747","user_name":"复古夏季"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1169512740703747","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1748521167,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":17,"name":"击穿次元","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47c082300352c1a9e6e7669d207df6fb","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/57235e9992067573933a8f743e5f9044"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6853750848665685005","book_info":{"abstract":"苏宁大学毕业，送快递送了99天后，终于觉醒快递神豪系统！
只要送快递，就有神豪奖励！
“叮咚，恭喜宿主完成一个特殊快递，奖励十个亿！”
“叮咚，恭喜宿主完成一个特殊快递，奖励兰博基尼毒药一台！”
“叮咚，恭喜宿主完成一个特殊快递，奖励三星米其林餐厅。”
“叮咚，恭喜宿主完成一个特殊快递，奖励十栋房。”
“叮咚，恭喜宿主完成一个特殊快递，奖励企鹅集团30%股份。”
………
某次记者采访。
记者：“苏先生您好，怎么才可以像您一样成为千亿富翁。”
苏宁：“这个简单，少赚9000个亿。”
全体记者石化，在风中凌乱。
从此，帝都出现了一位靠送外卖制霸全球的超级首富！！
我叫苏宁，我是一名平平无奇快递员。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/13e26da3155d34f11549e7cd1ed8ac17","author":"吹不起的泡泡","author_id":"","book_id":"6853750848665685005","book_name":"我送快递有神豪奖励","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#787878","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1786人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6853784012347933191","read_count":"1786","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1347934"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"657","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,外卖,神豪,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/38d8750bbcb335f105738f532c47d474~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388580&x-signature=M2EGU1Bpuj3MKiBMTwVfkTaomoQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"673"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323023620F89FE50E7C1E60BA3362"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":31,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":58,"read_b
